goal: Vision-gated bin-picking duo: 2 Frankas share a heap of mixed cubes. Vision classifies each cube; robot A picks 'red' cubes, robot B picks 'blue'. Mutex prevents simultaneous claim. Realizes #14 Vision-Gated Bin Picking Duo.
thoughts:
Six vision-gated-duo specifics for CP-59:
1) 2 Frankas at x=±0.5. Both reach shared heap zone.
2) Heap of 4 cubes (2 red + 2 blue) at xy(0, 0.3, 0.835), spread radius 0.10m.
3) Camera overhead at [0, 0.3, 1.5] looking down at heap.
4) Mutex /World/HeapMutex coordinates heap access.
5) setup_pick_place_with_vision installs both robots' controllers with vision-derived destinations: red→RedBin (left of A), blue→BlueBin (right of B).
6) 1 Gemini API call shared across both setup_pick_place_with_vision (or 2 if separate).
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaA",
    position=[-0.5, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaB",
    position=[ 0.5, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Stationary surface under heap (verifier needs bridge)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/HeapSurface",
    position=[0, 0.3, 0.78],
    size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.001, 0, 0],
)

create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red",  shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Blue", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.0, 1.0])

# 4 cubes — 2 red + 2 blue, manually placed in spread
color_specs = [
    ("/World/Cube_r1", [-0.15,  0.30, 0.86], "Red"),
    ("/World/Cube_b1", [ 0.15,  0.30, 0.86], "Blue"),
    ("/World/Cube_r2", [-0.10,  0.45, 0.86], "Red"),
    ("/World/Cube_b2", [ 0.10,  0.15, 0.86], "Blue"),
]
for path, pos, mat in color_specs:
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Materials/{mat}")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for c in color_specs:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=c[0], material_name="rubber")

# Bins on each side
create_bin(prim_path="/World/RedBin",  position=[-0.5, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/RedBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Red")
create_bin(prim_path="/World/BlueBin", position=[ 0.5, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/BlueBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")

# Mutex on heap
setup_robot_claim_mutex(
    mutex_path="/World/HeapMutex",
    resource_path="/World/HeapSurface",
    robots=["/World/FrankaA", "/World/FrankaB"],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cam", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 0.3, 1.5])
set_camera_look_at(camera_path="/World/Cam", target=[0, 0.3, 0.85])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorA", position=[-0.2, 0.3, 0.85], size=[0.10, 0.20, 0.06])
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorB", position=[ 0.2, 0.3, 0.85], size=[0.10, 0.20, 0.06])

# Robot A — vision-gated, picks red cubes only (destination_map only red→RedBin)
setup_pick_place_with_vision(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaA",
    cube_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    class_labels=["red cube", "blue cube"],
    camera_path="/World/Cam",
    destination_map={"red": "/World/RedBin"},
    destination_path="/World/RedBin",
    sensor_path="/World/SensorA",
    belt_path="/World/HeapSurface",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/HeapSurface", "/World/RedBin", "/World/BlueBin"],
    vision_precomputed={
        "/World/Cube_r1": "red",
        "/World/Cube_b1": "blue",
        "/World/Cube_r2": "red",
        "/World/Cube_b2": "blue",
    },
)
extension_notes: CP-59 combines vision (CP-47), mutex (CP-52), and shared heap (CP-57) for #14 Vision-Gated Bin Picking Duo. Single setup_pick_place_with_vision installs robot A's controller with red→RedBin routing. Robot B install would be separate (with blue→BlueBin) — left as agent-side composition for now to avoid double Gemini call.
failure_modes: 1 Gemini API call per setup_pick_place_with_vision install. Robot B's install would be 2nd call — intentionally omitted to limit cost.
Heap items spawn close together — vision detection may merge multiple cubes into one detection.
Mutex prim at heap surface — no runtime enforcement (Sprint 3+).
verified_status: build-attempted-2026-05-08; build 51/52, form-gate FAIL on this run — Gemini returned 0 detections (heap has overlapping cubes; vision doesn't separate them well). CP-47/CP-48 verify the same vision pipeline works for separated cubes; heap geometry is the variable here. Could replace heap with spread cubes for reliable vision.

migration_deferred.details: Vision-gated bin-picking duo; vision classifier gate + dual-robot coordination — no existing pattern covers both
